Please install woocommerceEventon Ticket Variations & Options need Woocommerce plugin to function properly. Please install woocommerce

							Loading
							
									
			
				
			
				
										
			
		
		
					General RSVP SettingsAllow only logged-in users to submit RSVPSelect only certain user roles with RSVPing capabilities (If not selected all logged-in users can RSVP)
								Administrator
								Editor
								Author
								Contributor
								SubscriberPre-fill fields  if user is already logged-in (eg. first name, last name, email)Activate uneditable pre-filled fieldsDisable creating new account for new RSVP userOrder Attendees by   Last Name First NameShow guest list as   Initials Full NameLink guests to matching user profileCustom Link structure for the guest user profile page link (This is appended to your base website URL)You can use {user_id}, {user_nicename} in your link structure, which will be replaced with dynamic value. The above link structure must not contain your base website URL.
							NOTE: If you are using buddypress profiles you do not need to fill custom link structure.Disable Nonce verification check upon new RSVP submissionShow RSVP form within EventCard instead of lightboxWhen to close RSVP to new RSVPs  When event starts Allow until event ends Never close RSVP, even after event endsEventTop Data for RSVP.Activate RSVPing with one-click from eventTop ONLY for logged-in usersShow attending guest countShow not attending guest countShow remaining spaces countDo NOT show eventtop "RSVP Closed" or "No more spaces left" tag above event title, when rsvps are closed.NOTE: You can download all RSVPs for an event as CSV file from the event edit page under RSVP settings box.RSVP TroubleshootActionUser Event Manager RSVP settingsAllow front-end download of attendees list as CSV fileAllow front-end checking guestsAuto add event submitter email to receive notification emails upon new RSVP
					Email TemplatesSupported Email Subject Dynamic Tags: {event-name} {rsvp-id}Disable sending all emailsReceive email notifications upon new RSVP receiptNOTE: This will send email notification upon new RSVP to the email specified below. Furthermore, you can also set additional email addresses to receive notifications on each event edit page."From" Name"From" Email Address"To" Email AddressEmail Subject lineEmail Subject line (update)HTML TemplateTo override and edit the email template copy "eventon-rsvp/templates/notification_email.php" to  "yourtheme/eventon/templates/email/rsvp/notification_email.php.Receive daily digest emails for events (BETA)NOTE: You can set which events with RSVP to receive the digest emails for, from the event edit page itself. Important: the scheduled daily email will only get sent out once someone visit your website."From" Name"From" Email Address"To" Email AddressEmail Subject lineHTML TemplateTo override and edit the email template copy "eventon-rsvp/templates/digest_email.php" to  "yourtheme/eventon/templates/email/rsvp/digest_email.php.Send out RSVP email confirmations to attendeesSend out all confirmations to attendees who RSVP, for Yes, NO & MaybeDisable sending out confirmation email to attendees who RSVPDisable all attendee notificationsDisable sending out new user password in confirmation email"From" Name"From" Email AddressEmail Subject lineEmail Subject line (For RSVP updates email to attendee)Email Subject line (For new user pass)Contact for help linkHTML TemplateTo override and edit the email templates, copy default email templates from "eventon-rsvp/templates/" to  "yourtheme/eventon/templates/email/rsvp/ folder.Invitation EmailsDisable sending out invitation emailEmail Subject Line (Invitation Email)
					RSVP Form SettingsSelect RSVP status options for selection. NOTE: Yes value is required. No value will show on change RSVP form regardless to allow users to cancel their reservation.
								Maybe
								NoSelect RSVP form fields to show in the form. (** First , Last names, and Email are required)
								Phone Number
								RSVP Count -- (If unckecked system will count as 1 RSVP)
								Receive Updates About Event -- (Acknowledge Checkbox field)
